hooks.command: if [ -f .claude/knowledge/pitfalls.md ]; then echo '📚 Knowledge loaded: Check .claude/knowledge/ for past learnings before starting.'; fi

if git diff --stat HEAD~1 2>/dev/null | grep -q 'file'; then echo ''; echo '════════════════════════════════════════════'; echo '🧠 SELF-IMPROVEMENT REVIEW'; echo '════════════════════════════════════════════'; echo 'Task completed. Consider: '; echo '  1. Any pitfalls encountered? → .claude/knowledge/pitfalls.md'; echo '  2. Useful workflow discovered? → .claude/knowledge/workflows.md'; echo '  3. Architecture decision made? → .claude/knowledge/decisions.md'; echo ''; echo 'Say: review what you learned'; echo '════════════════════════════════════════════'; fi
echo ''; echo '💾 COMMIT DETECTED — Review if this commit contains learnings worth saving.'
echo '🧪 TEST COMPLETE — If debugging was involved, consider documenting the solution.'
echo '🔨 BUILD COMPLETE — If there were build errors, save the fix to knowledge base.'
echo '🚀 DEPLOY COMPLETE — Document deployment steps if complex.'
